executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Run a COMPLETE test of ALL app features using login teste10@teste.com / 123456 at http://localhost:9002. Test every major functionality: (1) Login flow, (2) Dashboard KPIs, (3) Student list and management, (4) Student enrollment (create new student with full data - name, email, CPF, phone, address), (5) Workout plan creation and assignment, (6) Payment management and invoice list, (7) Body measurements, (8) Configuration pages - profile settings, subscription details, support tickets. Ensure every pass/fail is clearly reported. Pay special attention to the fixed phone validation and the newly optional street field in the student modal.
